section.heading: Authorization of appropriations

content.p: There is authorized to be appropriated $150,000,000 during the 5-year period beginning on October 1, 2023, to carry out the purposes of this part.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 87–195, pt. II, § 594, as added Pub. L. 118–31, div. F, title LXIII, § 6307, Dec. 22, 2023, 137 Stat. 993.)
